title: Senior Software Engineer - Cognizant - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cognizant - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant:
Cognizant is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant!
